review_text: Staff are professional and friendly, cabin's are so cosy
We stayed in a caravan site here, the facilities were great, staff also great, location excellent. We really loved the marriage saver...it sure is!!!
Lovely park. Very clean and tidy. Kids had fun on the jumping pillow and playing putt putt.

2nd stay , many more to come.  Always willing to help out. GREAT TEAM  Thank you

What a team.  From booking to parking to departure, Staff so friendly,and willing to help. The service here is a credit to each and every staff member. Amenities close to site and exceptionally clean.
My only suggestion would be a disability accessible shower, maybe a seat in one of the current cubicles and hand rails.This however did not impact on the quality of our stay here.  We will be back.

Love it here
Plenty of options to stay units.caravans, overnight
Absolutely amazing caravan park, very clean and well maintained and to top it off every member of staff were very friendly and accommodating will definitely be returning.

Great location for a river stay.
The 'valet' parking of your caravan is greatly appreciated after long or short driven.  Makes set up less stressful.  Handy to shops if you need to top up supplies. Love the herb garden. We have taken a small sample of each.. so fresh.
Staff do a great job keeping the park and amenities clean.  The gardens and shrubs and trees make a difference and are well kept.  Office staff are very happy and helpful.

Gorgeous little site with everything you need for a comfortable stay. The communal fire pit was a hit, the staff were lovely and the sites well maintained. Putt putt and the veggie garden was a bonus. Only complaint it ant is how close to the freeway it was - I wouldn’t let it stop us staying there again though given how close to everything it was.

A small but very well run and maintained Park.
Clean amenities, well kept grounds, and all the staff were friendly and helpful.
We throughly enjoyed our stay, camping with our cat.. the staff are so friendly and accommodating.. we will definitely stay again .,

Just stayed at the caravan park, friendly staff, immaculate grounds and amenities.
Nice roomy sites.
The tractor service for placing your van on site is fantastic!
Communication before and during our stay was great.
A bonus having a pancake breakfast on a Wednesday.
Will definitely be back.
Great park, good activities

We enjoyed our stay at Big4 Maroochy River so much that we've already booked in to return. It is a lovely family park, all the staff are wonderful and so helpful. The park is clean and tidy. We went during school holidays and they had activities planned for everyday of our stay. It was very relaxing. Thanks so much!

Overall the cabin was great and the activities the park had organised for the kids daily was awesome. Only real issue was the amount of sand flies! Being so close to the Maroochy River my family and I were absolutely smashed by them! But, overall the park is well kept.

Booked a site for 5 nights, clean park & amenities, small - but had everything you needed, kids were happy with the pool, jump pad, putt putt and little playground. Loved the movie nights for school holidays and pancake morning.
Sites were pretty spacious and the fake turf was perfect.
Thumbs down for the noise off the motorway. Very very loud traffic noise. Bring earplugs if your a light sleeper.
They treat the elderly there poorly and the manager watches the kids a little too closely
Stayed for 2 nights. The ground were well kept, sites where fairly spacious and staff where friendly.

Absolutely fabulous park . Staff super friendly and helpful , always happy to have a chat and a laugh. The cleanest amenities by far , tidiest park by far. Loved the valet parking option . There is really nothing at all to fault about this park . We thoroughly enjoyed our stay , wish we could have stayed longer . Would 100% recommend this park to fellow travellers or holiday makers ! Great job and congratulations to ALL of the staff!
Great park. Spotless grounds. Love the tractor service. Will be stay again soon.
Nice clean park .friendly staff

Very friendly and helpful staff
Park it’s extremely lean and tidy well maintained
All in all had a great stay
☺️

Had van site 21, it was perfect thank you.
Amenities always clean.
Staff always friendly.
Very clean park.
Loved the double imitation grass site.
Dump point close by and even smelt clean.
Great job big 4 maroochy

We just had a lovely weekend here with a group of friends with our families. We had 3 cabins in total. The positioned of the cabins were really handy with having kids. Everything was close by also. We will be back again for a weekend in the future. Everything you needed was supplied in the cabin so next time we can pack less. Thanks for thinking of everything you’d need!
Nice neat caravan park well maintained
Lovely place to stay. Fishing across the road in Maroochy River. Very relaxed holiday

What a great park , so clean , super great service from all the park team . The amenities are always so well kepted.
BBQ facilities are amazing , they also offer a tractor service for caravan parking and departing the park.
The park is so well situated to Sunshine motorway etc.
Star pub and round the corner plus great coffee shop Flumes 100meters away .

Great caravan park with friendly and helpful staff. Amenities are clean and tidy and facilities in good order. The pancake breakfast supplied by the park on Wednesday for a Gold coin was well attended and the collection donated to a worth charity. Well done 👏👏 A great location with the river just across the road for either fishing, swimming or your choice of water activity. My only issue was the lack of poop bags for dogs... I believe that the container on the post at the camp kitchen was for these. I thought that this was reason for charging for our dog? Otherwise what is the charge for?
We will definitely be back.

This is our second stay at Maroochy River Caravan Park. It is a beautifully presented and immaculately clean park that offers dog friendly stays right on the Maroochy River and central to all the action of the Sunny Coast. We will definitely be coming back as the price is reasonable and the amenities are spotless. They even offer guests a pancake breakfast at on one the immaculate camp kitchens on Wednesday mornings. We love the place. Can’t wait for our next stay.
We have loved staying at this park. Having the tractor service was amazing! I wish every place had this! The staff were lovely and the park was beautiful and clean. We will be back.
Won’t stay anywhere else when I come to the coast! The cabins at the big 4 both in maroochy river and Caloundra are always so lovely and clean.

Late in, greeted by a smiley face.
Great arrival instructions.
Beautiful park
Friendly people
Very clean amenities
Beautiful coastal stay.
THANKYOU
Great van park, wonderful stay as usual. Polite staff and clean grounds. Look forward to returning again as soon as possible 👍🏻👍🏻
We have been here many times & experienced a Caravan holiday, & a few different cabins & have been very happy & cared for through each experience.

We stayed in cabin 10 and I was very impressed with how clean it was! Super cute, 5 minute drive to the plaza/main beaches and easy to find. Bit of road noise but that’s expected and definitely wouldn’t deter me from booking again.
Complete tip off $350 for a cabin... Ridiculous prices for a powered site for caravan. Price hiking for no reason but they will blame power co's and COVID for price hikes. Disgusting....
Had a fantastic time at the Big 4 Maroochy River. Can not recommend this place enough.

Excellent campsite... has everything that you are after. It's close enough to the main road that it's easy to access, but not close enough that you get loads of traffic noise. It's also close to the bus stops, so easy to get into Maroochydore town centre, Sunshine Plaza, etc. An IGA supermarket is also within walking distance. I"d like to give a special mention to the staff, both at reception and maintenance. They were all very friendly and said 'hello' whenever you met them across the site.

We've stayed here several times now, we keep coming back because its just so welcoming. The staff there, from the receptionists to the groundsmen and cleaners truly couldn't be more helpful and friendly. The entire park is spotless, its in a great location, its not too big so is perfect to bring small children. Myself and my three daughters are proud regulars here for school holidays and quick weekends away. Highly recommended 👌

We stayed at the Maroochy Big 4 caravan park recently and loved it. Cleanest neatest park we've ever stayed in. Lovely co operative staff and the best 'gold coin' pancakes ever 😋

Oh and  they have the 'marriage saver' valet parking free ..  😁

Excellent 4 days. Very close to all Sunshine Coast venues and centres. Nice peacefull site. Thanks to all the staff for the cleanliness of everything. Special thanks to the fella that helped us put the van on site with the marriage saver.

Great little caravan park! Grounds and ammenities were always clean and well maintained. We stayed during school holidays and they always had activities on for the kids and gave us activity books for them. Just a short drive to the beach and shops etc.

Recently spent 6 nights here camping with our young family and couldn't fault it. Whilst others have complained about the noise from the motorway, we didn't find this an issue at all (we were in a tent). The facilities were some of the best maintained I have ever seen with teams out all day everyday working on the presentation. The pool and jumping pillow were a huge hit with my kids and the amount of space for them to run around was a great bonus. 100% we will be back!

A great caravan park to stay at.  Grounds are very well kept and inviting.  Love the community garden idea.  Staff were very welcoming and messaging on activities or matters in the park was great.  This was our second stay and we’ll definitely be back.
Nice park, Lisa and the team are brilliant, very pro active on making the site well presentable. Happy to help and very friendly!

We had a great stay for nearly 2 weeks here, great staff, accom was awesome and the location (right opposite the Maroochydore River) was spectacular.

The only downside was the small pool but other than this insignificant issue, this place is highly recommended and family friendly.

All the staff (from start to finish) were very friendly and alway up for a chat. The park was immaculate at all times.

We will definitely be back!!

We stayed at Site 2  for 19 nights over Christmas and New Year, and our experience at BIG4 Maroochy River Caravan Park was absolutely fantastic. The park is beautifully maintained, the atmosphere is relaxed and friendly.
A special mention must go to Lisa, who is truly one of the park’s greatest assets. She works incredibly hard—always on the move, always helpful, and always with a warm, genuine smile. Whether it was keeping the facilities spotless, answering questions, or making sure guests felt welcome, Lisa went above and beyond every single day. Staff like her make a huge difference, and we really appreciated her dedication.

Thank you to the whole team for making our long stay so enjoyable. We’ll definitely be back.

The kids were a bit disappointed that there wasn't a basketball hoop but they got over it
The staff were amazing, particularly Lisa and Mark. Mark's ring challenge had everyone trying for free icecreams 🍦
Our family had a great time. Thank you Maroochy River staff 🙂
Absolutely fantastic little park. Very family friendly and all staff were lovely! We will definitely be back!

Amazing place, friendliest and knowledgeable staff, always clean park and amenities. Great activities for kids and families. Will definitely highly recommend and will book there again as the sites are spacious. LOVE the marriage saver-can't understand why everyone doesn't choose it! We will be back!

What an incredible stay we had over Christmas! Such an immaculately maintained park and amenities, so many fun activities for the family and a great location.
We loved the mini golf, the pool and the overall vibe of the entire park. Couldn’t have picked a better place to stay for the Christmas break.
Can’t wait to come back and stay again. Sam, Jaime, Beauden and Diego xo
Had a great stay. Amenities were great

This is fantastic for a family! We’re a family of 5 who have loved every minute. Great spot for lots to do within a short drive/walk, great places to walk along the river! The facilities within the park are super great for kids as well. We’ve loved our stay so far we’re definitely coming back!!!

Great spot
Very clean and comfortable

My husband and I rented a cabin at Maroochy River Big 4 and it was lovely.  We had a two bedroom because we knew we would be entertaining.  The cabin was beautiful, large and clean and had great outdoor space where we had BBQ's with our friends using the private BBQ outdoor area which is part of the cabin.  The park is small, which is lovely and the location is great.  Directly across the street from the river we could walk to a great coffee shop a few doors away called Flume and have breakfast.  There is also a grocery store nearby.  The staff at the Big 4 were amazing and our stay was everything we could have expected.  We really enjoyed our stay.
Great location. Well maintained grounds and amenities .

The location, facilities, and staff are fantastic- especially Lisa!
No one try’s harder to make folk have a wonderful time

Spent a wonderful fortnight here. Staff excellent, nothing was a problem for them, ammenities spick and span. Being close to the river was also a bonus - fishing.

We will be back!

We stayed in a 6 person cabin, which was beautifully cleaned and presented by Emily, thanks Emily!
Lovely interior design and decor. Ample room and large beds.
Kids enjoyed the pool, jumping pillow and putt putt.
Convenient location to all we needed though close to a highway.
Great bbq facilities and outdoor table and fridge.
Thanks again!
Very close to highway.

What a little gem this is!
Small and personal
A big shout out to the amazing and  friendly team who help to keep it beautifully maintained

Rooms were very clean and the room is very nice. The location of the park is well placed, however, the cabins were a little bit hard to find. Our cleaner, Emily, did a wonderful job in cleaning our room before we stayed :) Very nice stay!

A great park in an ideal location on the Maroochy River.
Clean and tidy cabin.
Big thank you to
the lady at reception who bandaged my arm after a bicycle fall on Wednesday morning!

October 31 - November 1, 2025.            This is our second time staying at Big 4 Maroochy River same cabin Coolabah 11. My husband (Dayle) and I were very impressed with the new renovated spacious open plan and we noticed that the cabin has recently been fully refurbished and everything is new - kitchen, appliances etc...  Good size built-in closet, but has no shelving to store some folded clothes.  The cabin is very clean and tidy we love it, but broom should not be kept in the wardrobe.
We noticed the new bbq area.  The garden and trees are well maintained. We love staying here.  I highly recommend this place.

Big4 Maroochy River was a great place to stay, staff were all helpful and friendly, the site was perfect with level van sites and an annex flooring of sorts. Amenities clean and well equipped and serviced, they also have a van tractor service to put your van in place for you! They even had Pancake Wednesday for 45 minutes in the morning with gold coin donation to charity! Can't fault this place other than being close to the motorway, but having said that it didn't bother me and it made it easy to get to and leave. Highly recommend.

October 20 &21st 2021 My wife & I stayed in a Coolaba cabin. It was very clean and we were impressed with extra detail effort by staff like the special towel folding and small added touches like  flowers albeit artificial.Extra power points beside the bed along with usb ports a bonus. Friendly staff.We will be back, thank you.

Oct 31st Nov 1st 2025
Our 2nd visit. The cabin 11 appears to be refurbished with new appliences & Fridge, newly painted with modern kitchen,very nice. Presented very clean.
Only 2 minor points: No shelf in cupboard to put clothes & lounge although seems quite new,your back has to be slanted when sitting which is a bit uncomfortable. Overall though this unit very well presented. We love staying here.

Big 4 Maroochy River is a great doggie friendly place to stay. We were camping and had a wonderful powered site to set up our tent, tables and relax.

Each site had its own water supply and grey wastewater drain too. No camping on someone else’s washing up or shower water 👍

Also available were campsites for caravans, camper trailers, and Winnebago type vehicles.

The staff were friendly, hardworking, really helpful and kept an eye on the park too.

The amenities block was in perfect condition, easy to turn on and off ceramic taps 👍, clean toilets, hot showers and an attached pay as you go  laundry. The dump point is well located at the rear of the amenities block.

The camp kitchen was also spotless, cleaned daily and had plenty of chairs and tables for guests.

My overall impression for the Big 4 Maroochy River is fantastic 10/10. I will be staying here again.

For the kids there was a jumping castle, swimming pool and some games to play.

Rebbeca.....reception...
Sam...reception....
Do a very good job with smile for you
Lisa very hard worker 100% pleasant courtesy helpful at anytime..credit to staff here.All boys do a great job with cleaning of grounds..great pool ..Camp kitchens..clean 10 out of 10 ++ to all staff.
Lovely Park.. Great parking artificial lawn for van and sitting. 10 +++
Puppy friendly for our Lucy also.👍loved this park went and booked another 5 Days
Thanks all again...🍾🍹🍾
Bill and Ross site 51👌👌
23 /10/2025
WILL BE BACK 😉
The Tuckeroo cabin was very pleasant and cleaned well by Emily and Lisa
The team at Maroochydore Big4 were excellent. The staff were so kind and great with the kids and the amenities plus activities in the park were a big hit!!

We had a fantastic stay at Big4 Maroochy River. We stayed in a tuckeroo cabin, which was so comfortable and well set up. Park facilities were excellent and the activites on for school holidays were really great. Staff around the park were lovely.
We can't wait to visit again!

What a beautiful Caravan Park! Immaculately maintained!! Beautiful atmosphere and loved the camp kitchen with its own little cafe vibe; such a great set up. Thank you to Lisa for checking in on us and your friend chats. Would definitely recommend this park to family and friends!!

We stayed here with our caravan. We had a great stay. A little noisy with a not so main road running by, but its manageable. Pool is nice. Lovely clean and big amenities and very clean park. Caravan area in also great with shady trees and open spaces. Over all its a big plus ➕️ and tick ✅️ from us
We love staying here. Park is well maintained, and staff are really helpful. Highly recommend!
Lovely quiet little park, extremely clean & comfortable Tuckeroo cabin, with lovely welcoming staff

Super location caravan area  filled with all the necessities- within a few meters ,  clean bathrooms , camp kitchen  pool and playground, on arrival & departure moved our caravan for easy loading- highlights were pancake day breakfast , early morning & evening walks with our furry friend  along riverbank  - highly recommend

My 6 day stay turned out to be 19 days due to mechanical problems with my car.
I cannot express my gratitude enough for this park working its magic twice to allow me to extend my stay during a very busy school holiday period.
Special thanks to Sam in reception for all her magical skills.
Lovely tidy park with well maintained gardens...a little noisy with traffic
Stayed in a beautiful Coolabah Cabin. The cabin is stunning when you walk through the door, Savannah did an excellent job preparing the room. We really enjoyed our stay.

Great spot near the river. We stayed in a van site with a large motorhome. A little tight on the entry with trees on the entry & large cars parked in front of vans, but neighbours were accommodating which was great. Clean amenities & park is well maintained. Good off leash dog park close by. Would stay again.

We stayed for 3 nights in this cozy and well appointed park. It’s a smaller park than some others, but we loved that about it. Its location is excellent and the sites are large. Some
might find the motorway close by a little off putting, but for us it wasn’t an issue. They also offer tractor service for those who want to use it. We’ll be back for sure as loved everything about it.

Nice family hoilday park,  with lots of fun and activities for everyone.  Lots of entertainment in the school hoildays including food trucks and free movies. Lovely clean amenities and great sites available. We would come here again.
Great spot. Has a marriage saver! Don't need to park your van. Lovely spot. Have stayed here a few times now!

Überschaubarer Camping mit allem, was mab braucht. Sehr freundliches Personal, saubere Anlage, Kinderprogramm die ganze Woche.
Der Standort direkt am Motorway etwas laut aber praktisch auf der Durchreise.

Love this place, great location and clean and tidy amenities. I plan to travel around Australia and stay at all there parks.
I have stayed at 3 of there parks.
Kiama, NSW
Mt Isa, Qld
Maroochydore Qld.
Loved all 3.

Superb week at Maroochy River.
Camp site staff were outstanding. Really helpful and understanding of our needs.
Activities for the v cab Holden were great.
Great atmosphere every time we have been

We stayed here in 2023 in a campervan completing the last leg of our Big Lap and enjoyed our stay, so it was a no-brainer to stay here again, but this time in a cabin. ||We were met with a friendly reception and have had good messages while here informing us of what's going on in the park.||The cabin sleeps 4, we were in No10 which did back on to the road and could be a problem if you like it quiet but it didn't bother us.||The cabin was spacious and clean. Queen size bed and 2 x bunks. Good size fridge, 4 burner gas top stove, microwave, toaster, kettle, coffee machine and a good range of kitchenware. Air conditioning, table and 4 chairs, 2 seater sofa. Big shower and toilet area, basin is in lounge by bathroom door. 2 chairs and table on balcony and parking by the door.||The park offers mini golf and with Big4 perks membership we had unlimited games but didn't take it up and 2 x free ice creams. There  is a good laundry, amenities, pool and tonight we had live music.||The park is opposite the river, you could try your hand at fishing. Sunday markets are nearby at Fishermans Road and Cotton Tree. ||Thank you for a lovely 3 nights.
Checked into our cabin today for 3 nights. Lovely spacious cabin which was well cleaned by Lisa.

Extremely well run, all amenities and sites very clean and well maintained. Perfect for my 5 year old who loved the jumping pillow, yard games and pool. Highlight was pancakes made for us one morning in the beautiful camp kitchen.
Well worth the stay. Kid friendly. The Ground staff were amazing, even doing marshmallows for the kids. We will definitely be back.

I really enjoyed my stay in cabin 5. In a good location with a tavern, IGA, bottle shop and take away food a short walk away.
A 2 minute walk to the river. A perfect place to watch the sun go down. The fishing was pretty good also.

Absolutely loved our stay here.
Amenities were very clean, the sites for the caravan were a terrific size, having astro turf instead of concrete is a great idea and very easy under the foot.
The staff were friendly and helpful as well.
We will definitely be back in the near furture
Went there to visit a friend very nice around that area
Stayed in caravan site. Lovely park and clean with great service.

Good location and they have some nice big van sites. My only negative was they don’t answer the phone. On arrival and setting up, no water. I tried calling the office 6 times to find out what was happening. Phone call went to message bank then hangs up on you. So I walked up to the office and there are 3 girls in the office, 2 talking to each other and one helping a new arrival. So is talking to each other more important than answering the phone!!!!
Great location, very clean facilities, friendly staff. Very grateful for the tractor service!
Such a beautiful spot to camp for a few weeks (or days) at a time. Wonderful staff, so clean, and a place we love to stay at every year.
We had a very good  stay  and  some  nice  bike  rides

It was easy to book, we asked to. E close to the amenities and we were. Before we arrived the campsite offered to park our caravan for us which was great. The site was clean, well maintained, there was a fire pit and they also had a singer on one of the nights we were there. It was also very easy to get to beautiful walks along Maroochy River and watch the sunset. Would definitely recommend.
Caravan site suffers from severe road noise all night long
Stayed with these guys again this year. Still the same fabulous presentation of sites and cabins. Staff are friendly and very accommodating. Cannot find fault anywhere.
This caravan park has been fully renovated and is up there with the best.  Well done to the owners and staff for being top notch.
Small park. Very efficient and caring staff. Both times clientele friendly. Nice blocks. Good camp kitchen and activities.

Nice spacious pitches. Great amenities bar the laundry. When we were there there was only one tumble dryer and took 4 hours for us to eventually be able to dry the clothes we had washed. Other than this it was great. Lovely camp kitchen with a cute fire pit at night.

First time caravaners!!!  Absolutely loved this place!!! Going to be hard to find one as an equal.  The grounds were amazing, facilities impeccable, caravan sites large. The staff were so friendly.  BIG shout out to Alecia on the front desk you are so lovely and funny , I suggest the boss chuck an extra $50 in your pay this week.  Might be back in 2 weeks depending on weather and availability and I will have to chuck a sickie lol.  See you for a savvy B Alecia!

Best customer service of any Big4 parks I've encountered. Other Big4 parks could take a leaf from Maroochy River Big4 in providing their customers with exceptional care of their needs.
I was super impressed with their tractor service called the marriage saver where they offer free parking placement for your van. Ours is large van however it was quick and easy task for the tractor crew.
Park is kept immaculate all over and would highly recommend. All staff here are fantastic especially reception with a big shout out to Rebecca and Sam
Well done.

Would give 10 stars to the staff if I could.  Lovely location.  Clean ablutions and the pancake Wednesday and campfire evenings are a lovely extra.   Well done. Little jewel in the Big 4 crown.  We’ll be back.
Stayed here for 4 nights in our van. We were put right next to the road/highway. Traffic was very loud from early morning. It is a great little park but make sure you get a site away from the road.

What can I say. This is by far the best caravan park I've stayed at. We hired one of the newish Tuckaroo Cabins. These were amazing! The cleanliness was second to none. They styling was on point, the kitchen was well equipped & we had our own BBQ & beer fridge on the deck!
They jumping mat was well used by my 3 & 5 year olds. They also played a fair bit in the sand surrounding the mat. It wasn't warm enough for us to use the pool but it appeared clean & well maintained. We used the mini golf a few times. This could use a slight tidy up, but still very much playable.
By far, it was the atmosphere that sold us. Each night they lit a camp fire & everyone gathered & chatted. Often marshmallows were brought out for the kids. On the Wednesday morning, the park put on a Pancake breakfast for a Gold coin donation. The Pancakes were so delicious! The Thursday night, there was a live musician & a pizza van turned up. It was all just so wonderfully done. I had 2 interactions with staff asking for a clean sheet for a bed & an extra towel & both times, the staff were just so kind & accommodating.
Thank you for a great stay!

Great. Park .
Fire pit is a great idea for meeting fellow travelers

Very clean, well set out caravan park. The facilities are great and we throughly enjoyed the fire pit every arvo from 4pm.
We loved having the option of the on site tractor moving our van into place, the tractor saved time and tension!
The park is situated right beside the Sunshine Motorway and it was just too loud for me, there is no reprieve from traffic noise till the wee hours of the morning but it starts back up from 4am. Other than the noise pollution the park is very well attended, good value and the staff are delightful.

My campsite was easily located and accessible with plenty of room to manoeuvre. However, this wonderful property offers a tractor service to assist placement of towed vehicles onto the sites with ease. The grounds and amenities were kept clean, neat and tidy. An early evening communal fire pit was enjoyed by many and there was a wood fired pizzeria (onsite occasionally) open on the Sunday evening of my stay. Great location, friendly staff and a beautiful spot. I’ll be returning! 😊

Super neat park & wonderful staff
Unfortunately very noisy as van site was next to the freeway

The location was great as it wasn't far to walk to the Maroochy River.  The park was easy to find on Google Maps.  Amenities were clean.  Other than the fact that our powered site was a bit small, we couldn't fault the staff for their friendly manner from the time we checked in until our departure.  We enjoyed our time at the park.

OMG don’t stop for overnight stay $68 P/N parked for 20 minutes behind unattended vans before checking no car attached, taking the risk pulling out to enter a no smoking park but pet friendly with no water pressure. Why isn’t mentioned on website before booking? , it took 1 hour to travel 14 ks off M1 to the park. Nice clean park great for us grey nomad, but not a good overnight stop.
The road noise is like staying in a breakdown lane on a highway.
Sorry but it needs too be said. Please take down comments if you don’t agree. Greg
Great location.  Friendly staff. The tractor service is great for caravans, pancake Wednesday and putt putt too. We have been here twice and will be back again.
Immaculate caravan park. Our cabin prepared by savannah and itcwas spotless.

Great CP. Really well maintained and clean. Our site was on artificial turf which was great. We used the ‘tractor’ service but our site wasn’t as tight as some we’ve been on. Great location for getting around the Sunshine Coast. The river with walkway just across the road from the CP. Loved the mini golf. Only downside was the noise from the highway but it did get quieter during the night. Didn’t keep us awake. Would definitely recommend
wonderful facilities,  managers,staff, clean sites & FIRE most night and great company cant wait till next year

We had a fantastic few nights at Maroochy River Big 4 in an eucalypt cabin. It was so great we extended our stay! Cabin was emaculate and very clean. Staff were friendly. Thanks for a fantastic few days.

We stayed here on a powered site 10.7.25 - 12.7.25 . The sites are a great size . Facilities are great . There is A little mini golf course for the kids. If your a smoker there is designated smoke area at the front of the park . Life music at the park as well .

Also to save the arguments lol, there is a tractor called " the marriage saver " that will put your camper / caravan on your site that you get asked if you need help .

4.5 stars outta 5

Love this caravan park. Great location, quiet, staff go out of their way to help you no matter what. We had a family issue & Sam was able to help us out. Thankyou Sam.  Really appreciate what you did for us. We'll be back in December
Nice clean, well-maintained caravan park. Great facilities and the staff were lovely and willing to help. A big thanks to the staff member that fixed our hose fitting today :)

Had a great trip to Maroochy River Big 4 where staff were very friendly and accommodating. Stayed on well laid out site with easy access to amenities, camp kitchen and pool. Loved the visiting musicians and food vans.
Very nice, well maintained caravan park.
Big shout out to amazing friendly staff  always on hand to help residents in their time of need   thanks so much for all your assistance  😀 😊 👍
You love it, kids love it.  Everyday activities for kids.  River walks amazing

This caravan park is lovely, the sites are well maintained and the staff and grounds-men do such a great job of keeping it slick and span. They are also extra friendly.
They also do a tractor service to park up your van. So less stressful for those who need it.
Entertainment is also great, last night they even had a singer from idol, he was so good. Just sit around the big pit fire they light up, have a drink and eat the yummy marshmallows they provide.
Awesome guys thank you. We will be back

Had 7 days here on powered site , excellent caravan park Maroochydore, right near river and close to everything,
Staff are great and helpful especially ground staff , very clean amenities all the time and grounds very clean and tidy, great camp fire every night and enjoyed the pancake breakfast , have stayed here before and love it

One of the bestparks, we've stayed at. Normally we're travelling, but camped here for 3 weeks. Well kept park, great staff, great amenities and pancake wednesday, so good. Also they have the marriage saver to park you, we didnt need to use it, but had fun watching and adding our expertise

Very clean and tidy caravan park.
Tractor assistance if needed offered.
Staff were excellent. Had a warm and safe feel about the park.
Fantastic fireplace gathering each night tendered by the staff.
Convenient location to Maroochydore .

We recently stayed at the Park with our Caravan. We had a great spot. Plenty of room for our large van. It had been about 18 months since we had been at the park and I noticed a difference. It was just cleaner and appealing. The Gardens were noticeably very neat and I think her name was Lisa looked after us whilst we sat at the very nice fire pit. A nice improved feeling for this park. Congratulations

Such a great place to stay. So clean manicured gardens,open fire evernight with toasted marshmallows, pancake Wednesday morning,wood fire pizzas Thursday, what more does one want. Staff member Lisa made our stay so enjoyable always a smile and completely goes out of her way to accommodate you. Well done Lisa the park should be so proud of you.
Great park. Kids loved it. The staff made it 10/10. Lisa was so very kind and generous to our kids, they are still talking about the pancakes and marshmallows. Clean tidy sites and amenities.
The newly renovated cabins are awesome! Checked out the bigger family sized ones and all I can say is they are luxury for a holiday camp ground! Well done!
Great park. Amenities and surrounds spotless. Staff very friendly and accommodating. Wifi not so good. Would certainly stay again.
Great holiday park very close to shops n river.

Van sites are excellent, level and easy to get in and out of.
Positioned in a central location to north, south and hinterland adventures.
Facilities are clean and pleasant smelling. My only criticism is there are no disability facilities (toilet or showers).
Reasonably priced and would probably stay again.

Outstanding stay! Beautiful staff, lovely grounds. Even pancake morning with gold coin donation we were so lucky to be there for that. And… lovely, huge fire pit where we met many other travellers as a good-looking staff member 😅 cooked the children marshmallows over the fire. We really did not want to leave! 🤣
Wonderful staff. We'll be back.
Nice park, friendly staff but traffic noise is terrible

Great caravan park.  Super clean amenities and top of the line camp kitchen.  Pancakes on Wednesday great idea with donations to charity.  Bit of road noise from highway but I have experienced a lot worse.  Would definitely stay again.

I'm back again .   Again it was fabulous.  Always is. The staff are always the best.  They park your caravan with a little tractor.  It is near the motorway so it might be a little more noisy over that side but it didn't worry me at all. But now they have lights on the corner of Bradnam Ave so a lot easier to get on the motorway.  It feels safe and it was always clean and tidy. Groundsman and cleaning staff, Jules and her office, all amazing people.
Great service and nice clean
Lovely spot. Neat and tidy. Nice sites too. Plenty of room with parking out front.

Such a lovely park. Very friendly staff, clean amenities and grounds. Nightly open fire. Wednesday morning pancakes and visiting food vans what’s not to love. Special mention to Lisa-always friendly and nothing was too much trouble. We will be back

Very welcoming Big4 camp site, and friendly staff. There is a large outdoor kitchen and all the usual facilities;  jumping pad and park and pool for kids, the whole site was very well managed and very clean. River is nearby, albeit across a  busy road, and there is good access by road to all the local tourist attractions. |There are some lovely meandering foot paths and delightful foliage, and whole camp area lights ups prettily at night. |Unfortunately our particular pitch was next to the busy motorway, right on top of the exit gate, bbq and pool area, with a not so relaxing view of the noisy main roads and three refuse bins… so overall not suitable for a return visit as my partner was very happy to leave and go home.

Place was beautiful, clean and quiet.
Nice location with a little cafe around the corner.
The park was the cleanest park we have ever visited.

It was a great stay at this maroochy big 4 the staff were very Acomadating. The cleaners did an excellent job keeping the ammenities very clean 5 stars also the groundsman/caretakers did a Great job with keeping the gardens and lawns well maintained il definitely be back sometime.
A great place to stay, excellent location and service. The staff were so welcoming and went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable and enjoyable.
Great park for families, excellent service and events during holidays for the whole family, close to shops, beaches and holiday attractions.
Clean amenities, close to everything, shops/coffee within walking distance. Staff were friendly and the park was well kept. Kids loved the jumping pillow, mini golf and pool.

Very friendly staff with good customer service. Very small park with not a huge range of activities and facilities for families. Facilities were very clean and the gardens/grounds were very well kept.

Main downfall was the location. It was our 4th Big4 Park in over a fortnight but it is located right under the Sunshine Coast motorway. Therefore I do not recommend camping. We all had the worst nights sleep ever and chose to leave the park early because we were so tired. Unfortunate end to our trip on the sunshine coast!

Great unit/facilities and very comfortable bed. Thank you for a great stay. The children’s programs were great and the kids loved the jumping pillow, putt putt golf and particularly the dance night. Food vans were top too.

Our stay at Big 4 Maroochydore was okay, but for the price, we expected a lot more. The park is quite small, and the pool was about the size of a backyard one—once a few families were in, it felt overcrowded. There was little in the way of entertainment for families. A jazz singer on Saturday night didn’t quite hit the mark.

The kids did enjoy the jumping pillow, but the constant SMS messages reminding them not to ride scooters after 6pm felt a bit excessive and took away from the relaxed holiday vibe.

Overall, it was clean and tidy, but definitely not worth the money we paid. We were hoping for more value, space, and family-friendly fun.
Amazing Staff either in reception or around the grounds including the Amenities and the activities you provided were first class.
Nice clean tidy park..amenities are ageing but still well maintained..love the tractor service putting van on site..staff all very friendly..
Enjoyed our stay. Caravan sites are a good size but very tight getting in with larger vans. Thankfully they have a tractor on hand to get you in and out. Staff are pleasant and helpful.

I found the team at Maroochy River Park to be very helpful, freindly and caring to my every needs. The park in general is very well cared for and maintained with a lot of pride and love. It is set far enough out of town to be quite and peaceful and still close enough to be able to get to town very easily. there is a great little Pizzeria around the corner as well as a small shopping centre close by to cater for all your needs. I would have no trouble recommending this park to anyone. Thank you for a great time while i was with you.
John F. Howson

Excellent location close to everything we wanted. Rooms were clean, well stocked and we loved the Ziggy bbq on the deck of the cabin for easy cooking. Lots for kids to do in the park and great pool.  Very friendly staff. Could not be more pleased with our 1 week stay at Big4 Maroochy River
We were extremely impressed with the standard of the cabin we stayed in. Very clean & in very good condition. Even though the weather was miserable it was pleasant to just stay in the cabin & relax.
Stayed with our own caravan great spot to stay, amenities were always immaculate. Great pancakes on Wednesday morning ,close to all attractions could not have a better park will be back
Great park and very quiet and well maintained. Well done all the staff and thanks
Had a 3 nights stay on this place and it was really relaxing, facilities are clean and well looked after and the position of the site makes it easy to get around the area. Will come back. Cheers

Great spot close to everything especially the river. Noise from highway close by can be loud overnight. Grounds were clean and tidy. Toilets and showers well maintained. Had a lovely weekend stay for my sons 20th birthday  and went jetsking up the river with Swan boat hire.

Lovely, big clean sites, excellent customer service. We were SO grateful that we could get in at 5pm on a Friday after Coolum Beach had terrible customer service and had given us the wrong site for our van. This was a fantastic park, very clean, spacious and we loved the plants around our site so that there was extra privacy. Also loved the free mini-golf, pool and jumping pillow for our 3-year-old. Of course the one down-fall is that it isn't exactly quite, being next to a highway, in saying that, our site (50) backed onto this road and I am a VERY light sleeper, and I was able to sleep through the night on all nights - I had the a/c on and fans for white noise. Really love BIG4. Thank you
Well maintained park and clean facilities.

Just spent a relaxing weekend at this caravan park. It is close to everything on the Sunshine Coast. The park itself is very well maintained and the facilities were very clean. Only downer is that some of the caravan sites are a bit tight, but the staff will assist you by putting your van onsite for you. Saves a lot of yelling and is a real Marriage saver.
Yard staff and cleaning staff were great  the toilets were clean and smelt clean. There was a day someone had an accident and the poor staff who had to clean it done a wonderful job. Caravan site

Great little park. Has activities for the kids during the day/ afternoons, has food trucks and pancake days.
Live music on some afternoons.
Sites nice and handy to everything.
Pay for laundry and dryer.
Has a pool however not big enough to cater for all the kids  and adults and not enough shade options either.
Has a big camp kitchens, both have BBQ, toaster, kettle and washing facility's.
1 has a microwave and 3 mini fridges as well.
A huge  jumping pad for the kids as well.
Reception sells a few  bits a pieces.
4/5.

Some of the staff and nices it is not really a big park pool was very small the part that sucked was U could not smoke even if you had your own caravan not marked any where in park and some people friendly it is full of Karen's and Ken's I have gone to a lots of big 4 caravan parks but this one has to be the worst one I have been to it is nothing like there website makes it out to be.

We stayed in our caravan on a powered site while our sons and their families stayed on adjacent sites or in cabins.
The facilities were very well appointed, well kept and very clean.
All the staff were friendly and helpful.
We loved the children's activities that were available to our families especially the Pancakes provided one morning for a gold coin donation which was to go to a very worthy cause, 'Love Your Sister', charity.
Visiting food vans and entertainment providers made our time at this park lots of fun and created some great memories.
What a wonderful park, the staff friendly and helpful the facilities are clean and tidy. We will definitely be back.

Well org. place with great management & staff. Very user friendly.  Tent sites thru to Cabins. Great clean pool as are all the amenities. Cafe area lights up at night and usually has a Pizza/ Nacho van pull in so you can buy on site. Busy periods only i suspect. ( solo guitarists too) It's Right on Maroochy river AND there's a yuppie coffee shop around the corner for when you wake up. ( 100 metres) Can't fault ., check in now! 🥇👍🥊

Ein super schöner, kleiner Campingplatz. Der sauberste und schönste den wir an der Ostküste besucht haben. Ganz viel Liebe zum Detail. Kleine Blumenkästen an jedem Stellplatz und alles top gepflegt!

2 Nachteile sind leider der kleine Pool und die Lage an einer großen Straße.

Trotzdem würden wir wieder kommen, da uns das Ambiente so gut gefallen hat!

Love this place as it has been a wonderful experience for us all and for all the activities that have been happening around the park.We have meet a lot off friends and our children have had the opportunity to meet others and enjoy their company to.Thank you for the time we had as a family.

Weekend down in the “big smoke” and Big 4 Maroochy RIver was the perfect spot to set up the van and spend a few days shopping, eating, drinking and having fun.  Beautifully maintained park, great customer service (including tractor parking assistance if you don’t feel comfortable doing it yourself) and all round old fashioned hospitality (food vans, live music, people being kind and having fun).  There should be more like this one.  Super convenient location, great for walks along the river too.  A+

A really great park! Check in was easy by a lovely staff member. Amenities block is kept extremely clean and also BBQ areas. Pancake morning today to support local charities! Such a lovely gesture. Definitely a great park to stay. Close to river and walking track. Dog friendly too!

Had a lovely two night stay here with the grandkids.  Great facility - couldn't fault for cleanliness and care.  Excellent communication with staff to confirm. From the site maps we did think it was on the river but it was only a short walk there.  Great beaches nearby (drive).  Some reviews about noise from the motorway but we didn't notice a thing.  Pool could be open a bit longer over summer but understand this may be a safety thing.  We would go back.
Great location. Friendly staff. Well kept facilities. Will come again
Lovely park, well kept, with very helpful staff.  They even provided  live music on the Sunday.  All amenities are very modern and kept clean.  Highly recommend.

Little peace and quiet camping sites, I like it!
Has an awesome camp kitchen, amenities are clean.
Doesn't have much for big kids to do, like some of the Big4 places, but still has jumping pillow, swimming pool, putt putt and a little playground to occupy them for a while.
Quiet weekend getaway.

Family getaway with daughter, son in law and grandkids.  We stayed in our motorhome and caravan. The camp ground is so well maintained, pool lovely and the kitchen area with outdoor tables, chairs and umbrellas a great area to gather as a group.  We had live music, pizza truck and pancakes for breakfast one morning.  Grandkids loved the jumping pillow and mini golf.  Amenities spotless.  Staff very friendly.  Abundance of fresh herbs growing all around the park.  Best of all dog friendly.  Will definitely be back one of the nicer parks we have stayed in.
Great caravan park , The staff are friendly, all the amenities are clean, and sites are maintained, we have our dog with us great dog friendly park .Highly recommend.

If you have kids and you want to keep them entertained, this is the place.
There’s a pool, jumping pillow, mini golf and even a massive connect 4 .
The grounds are lovely with green grass, that you can actually walk on , there’s no prickles and a tropical garden .
Ammenities are clean and so are the grounds. Good size caravan sites, they offer a tractor if you need help to get your caravan into the site.
Walking distance to the local hotel , that have lovely meals..
Excellent

We stayed in one of the new Tuckeroo cabins! It was beautifully clean, spacious and comfy. The park is well maintained and close to shops, the pub and easy to get to bus stops to travel into Maroochydore or just over the bridge to quaint Mudjimba. Would highly recommend.
What a great location, access to everything you needed was close by. . Staff were very welcoming and the facilities clean would recommend to anyone
We stayed on a site for 3 nights.  All areas were clean and tidy. I have no  hesitation in  recommending this park.

Thanks to all at Maroochy Caravan Park.
Friendly and professional service upon arrival in reception.
Amenities were exceptionally clean and the gardens added to the experience.
We have no children, but if we did they would never be bored due to location and play areas.
Also, a 5 minute to the hotel and an IGA.
Highly recommend this Big4 Park.

We had incredible stay at Maroochy River.. thankyou. Staff are super friendly and facilities were brilliant. A little out of town but having a car didn’t make this an issue.
We will be back someday.
Clean. Excellent facilities. Staff are responsive and community is welcoming. Good place to stay with kids although a little cramped together in the camp sites but no biggie
Very clean facilities and manicured grounds.
We stayed onsite with our caravan. The park ammenities were always clean, the grounds spotless, the staff very friendly. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay and will definitely head on back to this park

I can’t comment on the rooms as I stayed on a powered site. The location is not the prettiest immediately outside the site itself as it’s on a junction of two busy roads. However very close, only across the road was the river and all the facilities associated, along with every shop and dining selection less than 10 mins down the road.

The staff on the site were lovely, very helpful and friendly.

Just spent 2 weeks on Site 23 and I couldn’t fault it one bit. The staff from the receptionist to the ground staff / cleaners were terrific. The amenities were fantastic - clean and in great working order also the location was perfect. The internet and the “marriage saver” were also fantastic bonus which made the stay very satisfying. I hope to come back soon as this was one of the best Big 4 Caravan Parks  I have stayed in.

Fantastic place to stay right next door to the beautiful Maroochy River. Very friendly  and helpful staff.  Grounds are impeccable. Big blow up jump pad for the kids as well as a big version of outdoor 4 in a row, playground ,mini golf and decent size pool. The cabin we're staying in is very clean and comfortable and well appointed seperate toliet with basin . Only downside no proper door on the shower.  Was glad to see the small thing had been thought of water jug and ice cube trays along with extra garbage bags a decent amount of dishwashing liquid and plenty of tea ,coffee and suger as well as coffee pods. Also very close to an Iga and pharmacy and coffee shops.
Great family park, nice and tidy with great friendly staff. Amenities one the cleanest I’ve come across.  Loved the camp fire and live music. Will defiantly be back.

Great place to take the kids. This is what this place is all about, moreover the adults. You'll be asked a few times if you need your caravan backed in for you with a tractor. I don't think they have confidence in their patrons or are just overly helpful. No smoking on the premises, but if you go outside, they're good with that. Okay, with pets. Amenities could do with paper towels as they were all empty. Overall it was okay.
Lovely place to stay,friendly staff. Will be back . Spotless facilities & great green mats to park the van on.

Nice caravan Park, small, clean and close to most places.
Sites are very close together, more space between caravans would be great.

One of the big 4 caravan parks I stayed in a lot of big 4 caravan parks are well planned not this one
. The entrance and exits are the worst I have incounted  .  How many near miss accidents and accident the entrance has had  I booked in for 5 nites stayed for 3
The pool is that small
Such a boring caravan park
I was told to shift car when I was packing up . No another vehicle on any sites near me to be in there way
One good thing office staff nice and clean toilets
And the best thing was leaving
Expt when large Utes towing long caravans in entrance over park the parking lane lines by 3 feet   I won’t be back
Great place to stay with our large caravan. Kids loved the school holiday activities.
A great caravan park right on the river but away from the hustle and bustle of Maroochydore. The tractor service was great given that the roadways are narrow and cars parked in front of vans.

Friendly & helpful staff, perfect location for us. Quickly rectified an error in campsite booking (someone else taking our spot). Amenities always clean! We didn't get to ultise the rest of the grounds this trip but previously our kids have loved it.
Afterhours staff was rude and incapable of managing the facility. Too small camping site for family and noisy at night, really bad experience, Never go again

Friendly staff and a terrific service to park your caravan for you if you like.  Close to motorway but don't hear it from inside van. Pool, kid & pet friendly, close to shops and much more on the coast.  Has movie night for kids and food vans on-site certain nights (Japanese food van was excellent by the way).
Thanks folks.

Great spot, nice park with very clean facilities, mini golf for the kids, play ground and pool plus more. Staff are exceptional, grounds are very clean and maintained, our two sites were an easy setup, level in all directions with water, drainage and power within easy reach. Highly recommended
Great holiday program for the kids.
A beautiful park that is very well maintained and lovely and clean with special activities
Beautiful park, amenities very clean, sites have plenty of room and clean. Very friendly staff

We recently stayed onsite in our camper trailer with our 3 year old.  The amenities were modern, clean and tidy.  The park is small and very family friendly, something we were after.  We really enjoyed our stay and the location was perfect.

A beautiful clean park great location, lovely people operate the park. A very friendly environment
We will definitely be back

The staff were lovely but the park was unfortunately the worst Big 4 I have stayed at. The pool was green and tiny, the playground was very insignificant and the cabin had water damage all throughout including mould growing above the main bed. The wifi also didn't reach out cabin and also had no service which I believe was not their fault. The park was kept clean but the website is very misleading by making the park look better than it is. There is a lovely caravan park just up the road toward Bli Bli if anyone wants a recommendation
Nice park with all the basics. Friendly staff and easy access to everything we need.
Quiet location, attentive staff. Good activities in Park. Clean and tidy.

Great park on the river. Friendlly, helpful staff. Tractor to put you on site if needed. Sites good size and grounds tidy and well maintained. Amenities were so clean and tidy. Good walk and bike paths around. Campfire provided an opportunity to meet fellow travellers and some entertainment on Sunday afternoon. Flume cafe and pub, vg coffee, meals Recommend 👏💯
We had a nice stay January 2023 with plenty of facilities available as well as food trucks and entertainment.
Beautiful park! Very clean and well maintained, possibly the cleanest park I’ve been to. Lovely spot on the river to enjoy morning or afternoon walks.
We found the park very user friendly, clean  and uncluttered. The management and staff friendly and helpful. Parking the van up for you was  something a little different but very easy.
Very clean park amenities are spotless would recommend this park very friendly staff,sites are great 👍

Love this park. Facilities very clean. Nice sized caravan sites with fake grass  and great location. If you have trouble backing your caravan they will provide a tractor and so it for your. Pet friendly.
Our time here was great the staff were helpful and you could not ask for any better. The park is so well maintained and the fire pit nightly was a great way to meet new people. Will be back

Repeat return caravaner to Maroochy River Caravan Park.
Really helpful staff with  well maintained gardens and clean amenities.  The nightly fire pit guests social gatherings and toasted marshmallows are a a treat for the young and the young at heart.

Very nice park. Clean amenities & friendly staff. Sadly the charge of $10/night for the dog was a huge letdown. We did not find the dog poo bags or bins that were advertised either. After asking a staff member we were directed to the normal bins beside the amenities block.We have travelled extensively over the past 20 years with a dog including 6 continual years on the road. The only charge we have ever incurred was a cash bond of $50 on arrival & if there were no problems it was returned on departure (A great idea if park managers have any concerns). Sadly we will not return until the charge is removed as it made the accommodation more cost expensive than other parks in the area.

Such a lovely place to stay. This is our Dog first caravan trip and what a way to do it. She socialised with other pets and people.
The park was so clean and the staff friendly, the amenities were spotless. Lots were on offer from coffee to food.
Would recommend this when travelling or a short break away.
Not the best place to stay very noisy highway we left a day early

Must agree that grounds amenities are very nice however we were parked right next to the freeway and arterial exit and entry therefore sleeping was very difficult .Best thing was the excellent pizzas from around the corner .

Amazing and family friendly Park. Staff were helpful and the sites were super clean. We stayed in the cabins which were huge and very well appointed. Will definitely stay here again next time we visit the sunny coast
We loved the chance to get away and the Maroochy river is so close the walking paths are great. Loved our getaway.

Loved the marriage saver as we have a very large caravan. The man driving it was very friendly and helpful. The grounds and amenities are well maintained add clean.
All staff in reception and around the grounds have been very friendly and approachable.
We enjoyed our stay very much.
Nice park with good facilities and Quiet. Shame about 4 power outages morning and night driven of course by a cold snap in the weather.
very nice place good value

It was fantastic to stay in a smoking and  vapour free caravan park. I loved that it put childrens health first.
The playground does need an upgrade and a family bathroom would be fantastic but otherwise a beautiful park.

We had a wonderful stay and it was just perfect for the kids with great activities.  The cabin was spacious and very comfortable. The staff were amazing and so helpful with any questions we had. Thankyou for making our stay a memorable time.

This is a great park, the management and staff are amazing the facilities are clean
Coffee can in the morning is such a bonus
We will definitely be back
Great place to stay. Very clean and tidy ammenities. Friendly and helpful staff

We had a wonderful time for our last minute, one night stay in our caravan at Big4 Maroochy River.  The first thing we noticed was how CLEAN everything is! Gardens, bathrooms, communal eating/cooking areas, everywhere was spotless.  The staff were also so friendly and accommodating and there was plenty of small activities available to keep our (very busy) 4 year old boy entertained.  The highlight was the fire pit with toasted marshmallows and the pop up pizza van.  Thanks for a lovely 24 hours, we will be back soon.

Very nice sites and amenities were good, although when lots of children in the park they do get a bit messy. It was unfortunate the roadworks were in action as our site was right next to the road and was noisy during the night.
Great location, excellent facilities and wonderful staff
Everything was great and everyone was very friendly. I will definitely be staying here again. Facilities A+
Lovely caravan park, great showers & close to everything
Good location and service and clean facilities. The only downside was the need for a smoking bench not far from the front gate.
Good location. Great site. Clean amenities with hot showers. Friendly staff.

The sites and surrounds are very clean and well maintained. The amenities block is cleaned twice daily, which is fantastic.  The park is close to the river for walking or cycling. Excellent position to get the sought after sunset photo.
Major roads are also close by to access activities to the north, south and west.
We will definitely stay again, this is our third time here.

Very nice small caravan park with lovely staff. The grounds are nicely kept and the pool while small, is quite inviting as is the nice campfire area. My only complaint (not actually a complaint just an observation) is the sites are small and you’re VERY close to your neighbours.  The “marriage saver” service is a huge help and the guys doing it are terrific.

Not a big park but packed full of a nice variety of features. Very friendly and helpful staff and the motorway wasn’t noisy like I thought it might be. |We’d definitely stay here again.|We were on site 2 which is tucked away a bit but the crew skilfully guided the van on using the tractor.
The staff were all very friendly and did an excellent job looking after the surroundings

Fantastic caravan park.
Staff were extremely helpful and friendly.
Sites are very well maintained.
A special thankyou to Rebecca in the office and to Lisa
Who is part of the ground staff.

Excellent caravan park for all ages
Playground equipment in immaculate condition,  as is the laundry,  showers and toilet facilities and a lovely clean inviting swimming pool
The staff are always attending to the care of the park and very friendly and helpful
Lisa especially was very kind and caring to our little 🐶 🐶 Pepper
Cabins, and caravan sites surrounded by beautiful manicured lawns, flowers and fresh herbs
Definitely 😍 returning
Thank you for be so diligent with the service and care of this park.  Well done to the great staff
Great park...family friendly,  close to everything on the coast,  centrally located, immaculate facilities and sites...highly recommend.

Loved staying at Maroochydore River Caravan Park Big 4.Very clean amenities and sites.Friendly staff and close to shops etc .Very obliged to owners for honouring our last visit three years ago,as I was hospitalised and left before we were due to leave.Many thanks 👍

Lovely little caravan park on the Maroochy River. Reception staff could not have been more helpful when we had to extend our stay recently due to our car being off the road. Cleaning staff and groundskeepers keep amenities and grounds spot on and it’s a pleasure to interact with such lovely people. Could not recommend this place highly enough.

Fantastic park. Ammenities are spotless everyday. (We stayed 7 nights paid for 6). Staff super friendly. We had site 34. Private and protected. Slight downside is the nearby motorway. Very noisy but it’s not the parks fault. Would definitely stay again. Great location to all the Sunnie coast has to offer.
Everything was excellent, well presented clean and helpful, and thanking young Lisa for her help at the  fire pit and information about the park for us ( 6 campers)
We had a caravan site, a little too close to the highway, but got used to it pretty quickly
Cleanest park around , a credit to the cleaning staff , welcome to lisa , never without a smile and wave , always on the go , a great asset to the team .

We very much Enjoyed our stay.

Larger park of mostly residents, however it’s quite separate to the front section for travelers.

The sites are all super well maintained, with Astro turf and fabulous manicured grass.

All the usual suspects, playground, jumping pad / pillow, pool, camp kitchen and also a Cafe onsite.

Super friendly and helpful reception team.

The only draw back is the road noise in the morning from the Hwy close by, but not unbearable.

Great location on the river, with easy access both north and south to the hot spots.

We will defiantly stay again

From the time we booked to the moment we arrived, all the staff were friendly and helpful.
We used the "Marriage Saver" tractor (just to see what it was like).  It was awesome, especially with how tight some of the sites were.  Norm had us in our campsite within a minute or two and he was a great bloke to chat with.
The amenities and BBQ areas were all kept clean.  The firepit was also a nice social area to meet other travellers.
Lisa, one of the new maintenance workers, was awesome.   She was friendly and great to talk with.  She also cleaned our camp area with the blower after mowing.   Very much appreciated.
We would definitely stay there again.

Stayed in caravan park
Great service, lovely friendly staff,  very good facilities! And affordable price !

Lovely, neat and clean. Staff juggled to fit us in. Had a great site near the exit. No neighbour.
The Friday night pizza van was excellent quality.
Great stay for 4 nights on a powered site. Clean. Quiet and easy access
Very clean & tidy caravan park with extremely friendly & courteous staff in office, cleaning & ground! Always enjoy our stays on  our many visits!

We had an amazing experience here. Our 1st time away as a family with a special son and it was perfect for us. The cabins were spacious and had everything you would need! We used the pool daily and went for walks!
Well equipped park close to river, cafes, a pub and shopping centre.

Had a great stay for 2wks. Friendly helpful staff. Easy flat level access to sites with tractor if you need. Very clean, meticulously maintained.  Thank you for our stay. Will definately be back on our return.

My partner and I stayed in a cabin for 3 nights. We found it very family and pet friendly. They let you know during your stay via txt message about the Pizza truck that comes in or any other family activities they might be having, plus the river is just across the road.
Loved this place.  The staff are super friendly and helpful. Amenities are well maintained and clean.

Please do not go past this gem! From the jumping pillow for the kids, to marshmallows around the fire of a night time and Wednesday mornings pancakes this place has gone above and beyond your average caravan park.

The facilities were clean and easy to access, staff were so friendly and the location is amazing! Walk straight over to the water for fish feeding or a nice walk along the water or duck over to the IGA (great for late night nappy runs!).

We will definately be back, our kids (2 & 4) had an absolute ball!
*Photo attached of the Wednesday morning pancakes with fresh cream and jam!! This was so so so worth the gold coin donation, they were the best pancakes I've ever had :)

Fantastic location on the Maroochy River. Amazing customer service including concierge tractor parking for your caravan on arrival and departure. Immaculate facilities and great activities for the whole family. Thank you for a wonderful week on the Sunny Coast!
Big 4 Maroochy River is excellent. The facilities are clean and well maintained, the soundings are great and our son loved the pool, pancake morning and putt putt. We’d love to come back soon.
Great place to stay and friendly, helpful people

Great clean Park in good location, Caravan sites are generous, staff are friendly and helpful. The toilets and showers and park surrounds are exceptionally clean and well-kept a credit to the staff and management.
A very nice and clean park, the staff were very cheerful and helpful and my grandchild loved it.
Caravan sites a a bit on the smaller side however we had a great time and will return for another visit.

Great caravan park situated just off the highway and across the road from the river.||We stayed here to catch up with family in the area.||Amenities were good and clean. ||Met another couple travelling and have become friends and following their travels around Australia. ||Good central place to stay.

Right on the highway so get alot of traffic noise. Pool is very very small. Sites are long but narrow so very close to each other. Was an ok park but wouldn't stay there again. Expensive for what it was. Shops close by and bli bli Aqua Park which was good

Just spent 7 days here and wow- what a great caravan park.  Masters 5 and 8 loved the disco, the Reptile show ( favourite) and the science show.  The pizza from the pizza night was a huge hit and everything was so clean and tidy.  The staff were also very very friendly and accommodating. We will be back.

We stayed here as it was pet friendly, but you had to pay $10 for the privilege |The park was right people in vans on top of each other, |The pool was small and always busy , the freeway was noisy and if you were a smoker you needed to leave the park to have a smoke there is no cover for them if it was raining, felt sorry for the older smokers |And expensive not cheap

Stayed over Easter decent park, good size sites, however not much to do to keep kids entertained for a big 4 park, one small swimming pool, no onsite cafe or restaurant, poor drainage around the ground have to walk though large mud puddles to get to common area, toilets very unclean , very poor live music no bar or areas for parents to relax and chill out.
Won’t be back unfortunately.

Excellent stay at this beautiful park clean and very popular for families .
Highly recomend Big 4👍👍👍👍
Clean
Very nice caravan Park great location apart from the motorway right out the front so bring some earplugs if you're not used to noisy road's

Rooms were clean but dated. The bathroom I had the floor was a bit damaged next to the shower so it moved when u stood on it.
My son and I both woke up with ants in out beds 3 out of the 5 nights we stayed.(no we didn't eat in the beds)
The pool was great and so was the jumping pillow.
On a passé 4 jours dans une cabine, et tout était nickel, très propre, bien aménagé ! L’accueil est très sympathique également. On recommande !
Best caravan area I’ve ever set up on, superb grounds, very friendly staff and great amenities

We have travelled across Australia over the last six weeks and have stayed in multiple caravan parks and facilities.

Big4 Maroochy River is the best we have stayed in. The staff are excellent, friendly and attentive. The sites are immaculate with excellent ablutions and good cooking facilities.

I highly recommend this park and will stay there again if travelling through the area.

Its was ok, bit smaller then we thought, and like a typical caravan park that your squeezed in that close they have to park you van with a tractor.
Vans like 1.5meters either side of you.

Did like the fake grass on the sites but its definitely no "Hidden Camp"

The Big 4 Maroochy River was an excellent caravan park. Amenities were modern and clean - camp kitchens and outdoor areas beautifully maintained. The staff were all friendly and welcoming-couldn’t fault anything apart from a bit of traffic noise but all in all we will return for sure!
This is our third stay at the park this time in a cabin and we love it. The location is perfect for the purpose of our trip.

Arriving at this resort we were greeted warmly.  Our site was super clean and manicured.  One of the cleanest sites we have seen in our long 1 month trip along the east coast.  The wifi works great! The pool is cooling and has some shade for those super hot days.  Laundry is paid through wifi/phone and we wish we could have stayed longer.

it was a good experience been there, clean amenities and services, we got a quick respond for all our request or enquires and lovely customer service for after hours.

Definitely will be booking again in the future

Luxury and Modern. Weekend stay for the Beach rugby. This park is central. Close to popular places yet out of the way of the hustle and bustle. I enjoyed the peace and quite. We didn't get to use all the facilities available to us mainly due to heavy rainfall on our first day. However I did see on the information that the laundry facilities had tap and go, which i thought was cool. We enjoyed every minute of our stay.

I HAVE BEEN CARAVAING FOR APPROX 30 YEARS & HAVE DONE THE BIG LOOP AROUND THIS GREAT COUNTRY OF OURS NOT ONCE BUT TWICE SO YOU CAN GUESS  AS TO HOW MANY CARAVAN PARKS OF ALL KINDS WE HAVE STAYED OVER TIME....||SO YOU CAN IMAGING MY SURPRISE WHEN MAKING A BOOKING & WAS TOLD ITS ANOTHER $10 PER NIGHT ON TOP OF YOUR NORMAL RATE TO HAVE A PET STAY :(||WHEN I ASKED AS TO WHY I WAS TOLD QUOTE: OH WELL WE ARE ONLY NEW TO ALLOWING PETS IN THE PARK & ANYHOW THAS WHAT OTHERS CHARGE (MEANING OTHER CARAVAN PARKS)||DO THESE COMPANIES THINK PEOPLE HAVE JUST FELL OUT OF A TREE?|AS SAID EARLIER NEVER EVER HEARD OF IT IN THE CARAVAN WORLD IN MY TIME TRAVELLING||WELL I SUPPOSE SOME PEOPLE MAY THINK THIS FEE IS OK?|| BUT FOR ME & MANY OTHERS I HAVE SPOKEN TO SAY ITS JUST A MONEY GOUGING RIP OFF!!||DEAR READERS APOLOGIES FOR THE CAPS BUT YES I AM ANGRY AT THIS TYPE OF PRACTISE SINCE COVID LOCKDOWNS FINISHED & THE RESURGANCE IN TRAVELLING LOCALLY USING CARAVANS UNFORTUNATLY ITS BECOME MORE COMMON.........

2ndvtime here. Selected for location. Once again didnt disapoint. Site 23 very handy to ammenities (ablutions, laundry, waste bins & dump point). Grounds very tidy, neat, trees/ shrubs lovely and green. Well done to staff. Lastly, very cheerful reception. Although I didnt need him, tractor driver parking van, terrific guy. Did grand job. They can N park the van on a 10 Cent piece. If we come back this way will definitely return. Oh, ablution blocks spotless. Well done
Great caravan park. Ideal location and very friendly and helpful staff. Could not fault the Grounds and Ammenities - clean and tidy. Would stay here again.
Very friendly and helpful staff. We will be back. :)

We have stayed her a couple of times and really love the park. The workers there are all lovely, the clean gardens and amenities are always nice to utilise. The "marriage saver" tractor is awesome - should be more of it 😀
We enjoyed the pancake morning.
Only let down for us is the traffic noise - while the park is in a great spot - this was one letdown for us. In saying that we will most likely be back.

We arrived in super hot weather but the team at Maroochy River were ready waiting to in hook and tractor our vans into position.
Great idea ! Everyone should take this on board. Cleaners and staff were very friendly and efficient. Pancake morning was superb.
Great atmosphere and set up .

We stayed for 4 days over the Australia Day weekend.  The park is easy to find and it was with great pleasure that the "marriage saver (the tractor used to move the caravan into place" was used.  Loved that.  The amenities block was very clean, which is always a pleasure as well.  As we were in a caravan the road noise from the highway was not an issue but our son and family were in a tent and could hear the trucks and cars quite clearly.  A tiny nuicance at best.
Caravan Park was exceptional both in facilities and service

What a beautiful little park.  The staff are so lovely, facilities and amenities were all clean and well looked after.. The kids activities during school holidays were the best. I would recommend this Big 4 park.
Great service. Staff park your van. Amenities ok and laundry good . Clothes line long way from laundry. Very small pool.

Wonderful place to stay. Located in a prime spot, beaches, river ( fishing), Flumes cafe ( check opening times as they’re not always open) the IGA and cafe at the maroochy shops were great to and walking distance. The park here was so so clean, makes a huge difference when they take pride in the conditions of the park. Ran children’s activities most days and had food trucks some days too. Communication was great. The best part was the “ marriage saver “  tractor that carries your trailer to your spot straight  away, literally saving relationships. Would definitely stay here again.

Didn't like
Midgies +++ and mozzies make it hard to enjoy spending outsidw the van
Location right by the Sunshine coast motorway, SO noisy. Trucks vibrated the van.
Very small pool
Small bar fridges offer next to no fridge space in the camp kitchen.

Liked
Nice staff
Clean facilities
They park the van on a tractor
Nice effort put in for activities and entertainment.

We had a caravan site.Well presented, great staff, great amenities, and close to everything we wanted. Also, they park your van in its location. It's very rare, but for some, it can help the holiday start off well.
Wonderfully clean, friendly staff, they park your van for you, which is quick and pain free🤗 close drive to the beach. The only minus would be the noise from the motorway. Enjoyed our stay.
Amazing friendly staff. Clean cabin and all gardens, facilities, roads, equipment were clean and in good repair. The park was small, but pool, jumping pillow and putt putt was fun and safe for kids.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Maroochy River Big 4. It was in a great location easy distance to everything that we wanted to do and places that we wanted to visit during our time on the sunshine coast. The service from the team was great and they take excellent care of all the facilities. The service of putting our van on and off site was not something we are used to but certainly made for easy arrival and departure. The only downside to our stay was the fan blower for the jumping pillow it was so very noisy and our campsite was right beside it, that being said it was not turned on too early in the morning and was turned off in the evening.

7 years enjoying one of the best managed parks a family could ask for, we have made life long friendships, enjoy the super friendly staff. Clean park with old school values. Can’t wait to come back time and time again. See you again soon.
Great place, great facilities and staff! Super clean and friendly!
