Great service. Park facilities were in great condition. Can't rate rooms, but our camper site was well maintained and perfect for us.

Absolutely 5/5.🥳 The women in service are incredibly kind and super helpful! The campsite is very well taken care of. Two open kitchens with fridges, grill, tables are more than enough. Toilets are clean and very nice to use. There’s also a place to make a laundry. No late parties, so the area is suitable for tired travellers and kids.☺️  Every Thursday and Sundays there is live music which is suuuper comforting after a whole day. Food truck coming every couple days so it’s good a good idea for an evening hunger😊 I really recommend this place for everybody who wants to have a good little vacation just 35 mins walk along the river from the city centre of Sunshine Coast.🔆
Caravan park was so well run and clean. The toilets are showers were super clean and so nice to use. First time in a Big 4 park and very much impressed. Well done all - made our stay perfect.

Been to this park a few times
It’s a smaller park but Lovely. Staff are always beautiful.
When it’s really busy (packed out) it’s harder as lots kids and not alot of room on sites so very close together and pool only small so hard to get a swim in as kids everywhere
They have a good and coffee van on site
The guys who run it are lovely and coffee and good divine.
Opens 5.30 am great time especially in summer when suns up at 4.30-5am
They have free herb vegetable gardens amazing
Wednesday are free pancake breakfast (just donate a gold coin for charity) amazing
Only thing I would say is that when packed out toilet blocks need to be cleaned more times as some people and children are very messy/dirty snd don’t clean after themselves in showers or toilets sadly. 😢
Clean, friendly staff, great for kids.

One of the subpar  campsites on our trip

+ Facilities are clean
+ checkin was smooth

- out of 3 washing machines 1 out of order 1 w/o warm water
- right next to the freeway, noisy
- way too expensive for what you actually get

Awesome place to stay , we loved the marriage saver at check in lol best thing we have come across on our travels , our site was excellent & also the 1 night in the cabin was excellent , very clean & tidy . Thank you very much for our 11 day stay . 😊.

What a great park this is.  We had a fantastic site for our small campervan, probably one of the best we’ve stayed on.  Staff friendly and knowledgeable of the local area.
Amazing Camp-kitchen with everything you could need and facilities.  Spotless amenities.
Highway overpass near the park was surprisingly unnoticeable.
Had a great two night stay and will stay again without a second thought.

Great easy location to get to, convenient access but can be loud at times due to the highway (they cannot do much about this).

The villas are awesome and everything you need, very modern with nice wood touches, the facilities are great bouncing pillow and pool were used a fair bit during our stay.

A few things I would suggest to make families staying even better-
1. Make sure the blind strings to pull it up and down are not accessible to small children as they go to the ground little children can easily access and pull on them.
2. Make the screen doors 1 way visible, due to small children and the location of the shower I'm sure a few people may have seen something they wish they didn't.
3. Due to the location of the pillow and villas small children are attracted to the pillow and go right for it (although i spoke to my kids, toddlers generally don't listen) A gate at the bottom would prevent this from happening and provide better security
4. A bike path on the ground would be great as when we went for a ride it appears we may have entered where we were not supposed to.

Overall the trip was great and would stay again

Was only in the park for 5 minutes before making the decision to go down the road to ingeria rivershore the spot i was given at big 4 was the size of my car and could barely move around for $30 extra a night i got a spot down the road 5 times bigger i had paid for 2 nights but could not stay those 2 nights as it would have felt the same as staying on the side of a road in a carpark for free very dissapointed in the size of the spot

Big 4 Maroochy River was a great park to stay.
We were in our caravan on a powered site next to pool.
Clean amenities and very friendly and helpful staff.
Smoking out in the corner was a little different to parks we have stayed in before,  but saying that - it was a great little social hub where i met lots of lovely people.
Would definitely stay here again.

The park it self is located right on the river and within walking distance to an IGA and pub. However we found the park to feel a little unsafe and probably not a great spot for families in the way of space and things for the kids to do. We also had someone try steal the speakers of the front of our caravan to which staff couldn’t really care, definitely a place that everything needs to be locked up.

This park has a ‘valet parking’ system for your caravan, because it’s ‘tight’ (it’s doesn’t appear to look any tighter than all the other parks) meaning you have to unhitch at reception, they come with a tractor to hitch it up and take your van to your site. And the same in reverse when you want to leave. Pretty frustrating as there’s a lot of waiting around and moving parts, people and vehicle congestion. Feels a bit silly. Maybe if you were new to caravanning or nervous about parking it up this would be a relief but we found it rather frustrating having to be dependant on their system. Other full time travel fams may find the same!
It’s not a deal breaker though, the park itself is quite nice but a lot of road noise from the highway. Reception staff were friendly and helpful.

This is our second time of staying at Big4 Maroochy River.  From the receptionist to the hardworking grounds people, we cannot fault their enthusium to help you and keep the grounds looking tidy so you can enjoy your holiday.  The marriage saver tractor is just wonderful in how quickly they set you up on your site as well as taking your van off site when leaving.  No doubt we will be back.

When I booked the person I spoke to assured me that a site would be available in the back street as we did not want one on the street opposite the motorway. When we checked in we were allocated a site in the area we didn't want (traffic noise very bad). We were not told that the park now allows dogs (no dogs on our last visit) and we had dogs either side of us, one on a long lead that came on to our site and barked frequently and another one that barked when their owners left it alone.  More often than not it is the dog owners that are the problem. We were not informed when I booked that the park has a dog free sites.

Big4 Maroochy River, was very local to beaches and major shopping centers all within a 10min drive. The amenities were very clean.  Staff were friendly and the Valet caravan/camper trailer service is beyond. We will defiantly be returning to this great Holiday Park. Didn't get a chance. to play the mini golf course, but when our family returns, it will be on the to do list.

highly recommend.
Close to the river

Beautiful location and very relaxing.
The staff are very friendly and helpful.
We had a great weekend, great spot lots to do, I love that you can now take your dog, we will definitely be back.
Nice clean park with friendly staff
Amazing staff. Large, clean and tidy sites. Community orientated. Fantastic location. Couldn’t ask for anything else!
Great spot if your touring sunshine Coast. Very reasonable rates. Great find.

Very clean and well maintained caravan park. 8 minutes away from major shopping centre, 1 minute walk to maroochy river which you could fish or walk along. Flame restaurant only 2 minute walk and amazing meals there too for those who can't be bothered cooking. Highway is loud but settles down at night. Small playground and jumping pillow, jelly bean pool with lounges and a large umbrella for over the pool. BBQ kitchen clean and well looked after.

We were very impressed with the Caravan Valet Parking. It was nice to walk around the grounds, they were lovely, and the facilities were clean & tidy, which was much appreciated.
Overall it was a nice place to stay, would definitely recommend.
A very tidy and friendly park with clean convenient amenities . Close to everything and very cheap .
Excellent park with excellent amenities very helpful and pleasant staff the only problem is road noise early morning and late afternoon
$10 per night for a dog to stay.  No shade
Fantastic place to holiday with the kids & friends.

We met some incredibly friendly staff. Sights are quite small but with the help of the tractor service to park your van it makes things much easier. The park has very clean amenities and is about 150m from the cycle way which is great for running, riding or walking by the river.

Bonus is that our fur babies can now stay here too.

Note; 3 stars for location due to the highway noise, but the friendly staff make up for the noise inconvenience.

We paid for 5 nights left after 2 nights.  When booking I spoke to reception regarding the highway close by.  I was told it's not really that bad for noise.  I asked if we could have a site as far away from the highway side as possible.   We were placed 1 row back from the highway side.  The traffic noise was LOUD until about 10pm and started again around 4.30am.  We were so tired after 2 nights we left losing the 3 nights extra we paid for.  The amenities were very clean, sanitiser was ample throughout the park.  We have stayed in a lot of Big 4's mainly in northern NSW but this one did not compare at all to the other parks.  We won't ever stay there again.
Great caravan park, immaculately-kept grounds and staff go above and beyond to make your stay as great as possible !
Was amazing . Was sick but still enjoyed myself and family loved it.

Our sites tucked away in a corner was fantastic. Loved it
Towing service great
Loved it. Amenities very clean. Loved it.
Our only issue was we found it quite noisy with the 2 busy roads so close
Not the parks fault but it was just busy over the weekend.

We camped in our camper van, the sites are lovely and big. Amenities nice and close to our site, and they were always clean and spotless. Staff were kind, friendly and helpful. Location is amazing, will definitely stay here again and will highly recommend

Don't normally stay at Big 4 as it's out off my price Range and i definitely don't review but here I am, wasn't to badly priced really and a benafit is they park your caravan, was a little weird to see but did a great job between the 2 of them. Didn't see the nightly events or morning events pancakes and stuff but sounded fun, fishing is also good on the river I had some good catches on soft plastics. Nice staff great place very impressed clean and tidy, don't forget to recycle it's all for charity. Will definitely return 2 this big 4.
Thanks
Friendly staff, lovely clean & tidy park. The 'Marriage Saver' is gold. Love having the van put on site.

We stayed 2 nights on 2 sites over the long weekend. The park was very well set out, the sites are large and clean and tidy.  Our family enjoyed the pool, park and play ground. Even though it was the long weekend, the park did not feel overcrowded. Pity about the road noise but the parks proximity to the Maroochydore River was fantastic for fishing. Amenities were clean, showers were lovely!

I, with 2 young boys stayed for 3 nights over the school holidays. I drove in, unpacked the car, then packed the car and drove out 3 days later.  We had a great time with plenty to do. Lots of fun stuff for the kids. Loved the cleanness of the Cabin and the grounds were   well mantained and clean at all times.  All the staff were helpful very pleasent to deal with. The cabin had everything we needed.  Thank you for a great stay.

I’m afraid it wasn’t what we were expecting. The pool was tiny, the jump pad was tiny - it was a park for families with small children, we had 2 x teenagers. We had very little pressure in our shower for the second and third nights and no hot water on the third night…..I won’t be staying here again.

This was a work stay whilst we awaited the return of our van. Absolutley beautiful park, the friendliest staff well maintained and clean. Whilst we camped in our roof top tent I cannot say what the rooms were like - however as the amenities were clean, current and convenient I have given 5 stars. Camp kitchens had all amenities we required for our 2 night stay. Fabulous place. I would like to have given an extra half star for the location. The only drawback to a full 5 stars is the road noise.
Very clean with a good choice of places to eat , bit hard to find your way back to Bruce hi-way if you don't know the place , I ended up going the long way to Gympie but it was a nice drive
Campingplatz gut. Sanitär auch gut und sauber..
The location is good but be mindful if you are given a site that backs onto the motorway. The noise is constant so ear plugs are needed .

Loved our stay at Maroochy river Big4! It's a small park but it was perfect for us & our 2 little ones. Great holiday activities, friendly staff & very clean facilities/accommodation. Will definitely be back!

We had a caravan site at the park it was generous enough and we had a great time all the staff were very friendly and if you needed any help they were there to do so we recommended this caravan park you will not be disappointed
Very good for small kids. Jumping pad was great. Pool was too cold for us. Units were wonderful, very clean and spacious bedrooms.

We had 2 lovely weeks here.  The grounds are well looked after.  The amenities are clean and tidy.  There is a fire at night to  help you enjoy your break away.
This was our 4th visit to this park this year.  Always welcoming and grounds well looked after.

Awesome place to stay for young and old. All the staff are amazing, friendly and helpful.  As a solo traveller, having them park the van for me is an awesome service and takes all the stress and worry out so you can sit back and enjoy your holiday. Highly recommend
Love staying here from time to time when in the Sunshine Coast.  Its a good facility in a great location which is close to everything you want to go to.

A little gem of a place. All the facilities are central and easily accessed. Lots of communication, including what size site we needed and then a response. The site for our camper trailer was all artificial grass and just right. The staff were efficient and friendly. All vans are towed to and from the site from the entry by two efficient staff on a small tractor.  IGA and great coffee/eatery 3 min walk away. GOOD free wifi. Adjacent to the major coastal road, behind a wall. A hum of daytime traffic but we heard no high pitch engine or braking noises in the three days we were there. Highly recommend.
Good park but much traffic noise.

We had a great time at this caravan park.
Absolutely spotless! I think this is the cleanest caravan park we’ve ever been to.

Great location, great service and great facilities. Unfotunately, we had a site next to the bouncy pillow and the blower was too noisy to enjoy sitting by our camper. It was turned off in the evening but then we heard constant traffic noise from the motorway.

Very good position to enable trips to many locations. Great park - initially put off by motorway noise but it fades into the background very quickly.  The river is just across the road and not flowing at the edge of the sites as I’d envisaged, but it really is only steps away.  The amenities are spotless, the staff cheerful and friendly, the nightly chats round the fire pit are the best fun.  Highly recommend and already re-booked for next year.  Some of the nicest travellers stay here!
Steve was incredible!
Rooms are old and tired and due for renovation or replacement. Staff excellent,  near a noisy highway detracts from peaceful sleep.
This is one of the great campsites that is fully functional such as playground, laundry, campsite kitchen and pool. The restroom facilities are clean all the time.
Loved our time at Big 4 Maroochy River, amenities and the park were immaculate and spotless. Thought the marriage saver was great more parks should do this. Nothing was too much trouble

The fact that they park and position your caravan for you is the best start to any stay😁very competent and friendly staff who keep the park in excellent condition. It was a pleasure to stay here and highly recommend this park. The amenities are sparkling clean, wonderful pancakes on Wednesday and the afternoon fire pit a great way to relax and meet others. Definitely will stay again.
Great stay, will certainly come again
Wonderful stay

We had a van site and kids had a cabin.  Cabin was very clean and luxurious.  Beds were great and has all modern amenities.  Van site is beautifully grassed with mat.  Amenities very clean.  Park is very well presented.  Staff very friendly.  Central location.  Highly recommend

Very clean park, unfortunately we were placed behind the jumping castle and the constant noise from the motor which was only around a metre from our Annexe destroyed any peace and quiet as it went for approximately 9 hours every day even though very few children went on it , if we had been informed, which I think we should have been , we would definitely not have chosen to stay as it completely ruined our holiday as we enjoy sitting outside most of the time but the constant drone of the motor was annoying to say the least , we should have been told in advance and given the choice as to whether we wanted to stay on that site , so poor communication
Nice park with friendly staff nice clean facilities and in a good location
This park was clean and the staff are amazing , I would highly recommend do everyone please come and stay you won’t be disappointed.  Thanks @big4Maroochyriver we thoroughly enjoyed our stay.. 🙂
Very nice and clean park, friendly and helpful staff. A great river walk. Highly recommend it for everyone. Love the tractor, made setting the camper up a dream.
Excellent park. Spotlessly clean. The staff are very helpful and friendly. We were made to feel very welcome. The marriage saver tractor is excellent. I wish every park had one.

Park is small but pretty, and immaculately clean. The cabins are amazing. Great for adult travellers as there weren’t many kids on my one week visit. They had a fire pit at night for people to mingle and some days a lovely girl playing guitar for entertainment. A short walk to the river. Staff were very friendly. I would recommend this park.
Great park very friendly staff with all the information needed for the sights around the area
The management went to great effort to make guests comfortable and the nightly bonfires were welcomed.
Spotlessly clean, garden's immaculate. Highway noise a bit of a pain overall a nice place to stay
Beautiful sooo clean 👌

Great neat and tidy park, was awesome to see the little tractor parking the vans, after spending a week free camping on Fraser we were looking forward to a nice hot shower, sadly that didn’t happen, no hot water, and our whole group (16 of us) had to have cold showers!
Awesome place, one of the cleanest parks we have been to. Friendly staff, daily fires and even had a pancake breakfast day. Highly recommend

This park would have to be the cleanest, friendliest park I’ve ever been too . The marriage saver tractor is the BEST thing !! I wish every park had one !!
Would definitely come again
Great park, Staff are friendly. Very clean and tidy.

Very neat and clean park, lovely amenities and friendly staff. The highlight is the marriage saver, they park and retrieve your van for you.
Another pleasant surprise was the strong wifi unlimited free data, much appreciated.
From the counter service to placing our caravan in place, what a marriage saver and cleanliness of amenities and grounds. Best caravan park! Well done!  Will be back.
Not many sites as it shares it with permanents which are located in the back section. 2nd time here and it won't be the last. Looking forward to return.
Lovely place to go for a holiday. The hosts are very friendly and the cleaners the most amazing job. There were lots of activities for the kids.

While the park was clean and neat the traffic noise defied the camp experience as did the regimented park policy of parking your van. The park tractor was underrated to pull 2t vans and no safety chains attached nor was there any electric brake control on the mini tractor (JD 1023E) The tow hitches were backyard weldedand not an approved hitch and towing on the front tractor hitch overloading. A simple breakaway in the park would surely test their public liability.
A great place to stay. Friendly staff. And there were activities on most evenings for your entertainment.

Amazingly tidy park with the friendliest staff. From the front counter, grounds persons and cleaning staff, all were professional and lovely. One of the cleanest parks we have been to. Location is amazing and central to everything. So nice to have them park the van for us as well. Highly recommend!
Beautifully clean cabin. Immaculate grounds. Very friendly office staff.
Stayed overnight on a powered site during school holidays. This place is very well run, facilitates are in tip-top condition and there are plenty of things to do at the park and within a short walk.

Had a really enjoyable stay at this park. The highlight is the tractor valet service to your site and out on departure. Staff are very friendly and helpful. Very well kept and maintained park with good amenities. Pancake Wednesday was also a highlight. Some sites are a little noisy due to nearby Sunshine highway, however, sites at the rear are very quiet. Thank you for a wonderful stay. We’ll be back 😀

Easy to bookin
Placement of trailer perfect job from tractor driver.
Emenities and grounds clean.
Friendly staff.
Thankyou
Friendly staff. Great people. We will be back.
Fantastic park to stay at, super friendly & extra helpful staff, excellent location we'll be back!!

Nice park with flat sites.   They "chauffeur" your caravan to each site.  Nice spot with walks along the river.  Kids activities in the park and Cafe, IGA and Pub close by.    I'd definitely stay again.
This is our favourite caravan park. Staff are wonderful, amenities the best, camp fire great. Highly recommend.
Great staff and atmosphere, the fire pit was the best for socialising and met some lovely people. Caravan was delivered to my site( marriage saver)Well done and will definitely be back.
Very noisy traffic noise. Staff were great. Needs a better pet policy, most parks accomadate dogs these  days.
Lovely neat van park. Lovely amenities. Nice putt putt. Very handy to the freeway, yet also lots of traffic noise.

Great park yes it’s not the biggest or the newest but it just works
From the time we arrived and dropped the van out front ( as they use there own tractor to place vans on and off your site ) till the time we left and hooked the van up out the front we were impressed
Hats off to all the staff at the park as all the amenities/camp kitchens and grounds were spotless
And everyone had a smile on their faces which means a lot to us not to mention their local knowledge
Definitely recommend as a stopping point

a very nice park with good sites and facilities. Easy access provided by onsite staff. Sites are level and firm. Staff are very helpful.
Great staff, very helpful and friendly.  Cabin was excellent.

Lovely clean and well managed park. From the front desk right through to the cleaners and grounds people, they are all there to help you or just to have a quick chat, nothing is too much trouble. Would stay again and certainly highly recommend this park.
The showers were cold last evening inspite of the cold 🥶 The light switches in both the toilet block & laundry area were not functioning… strange!!
Very clean park. Enjoyed our stay.

We stayed at BIG4 Maroochy River in our Caravan. The park itself is fabulous, the amenities spotless and the staff very friendly and accommodating.  We couldn't fault anything.
The "marriage saver" tractor that looks after the parking and removal of everyone's caravan was amazing to watch as I'd never seen anything like this before. Location was also fabulous.
A great park, very clean  amenities.  Felt spoilt by the marriage saver. And the pancakes were hot and fluffy 😋

We had a short camping stay on powered sites. The sites were very generous (with artificial grass mats also to increase comfort)  the sites/gardens were very well maintained. Amenities and camp kitchen were spotless and it was such a bonus to have a fire pit to enjoy each night.  The staff were awesome and so welcoming. Highly recommend for a short or extended stay. We will be back soon.
Super friendly staff, great location, very clean amenities
